visual_analysis.description: A green soda can with 'Sprite' written on it, located on the left side of the shelf.
A red soda can with 'Coca-Cola' written on it, located on the right side of the shelf.
A yellow instant noodle cup on the floor below the shelf.
A red snack bag on the floor next to the noodle cup.

action_plan.explanation: Picking the first requested item, the green soda can, which is unobstructed.
Picking the second requested item, the red soda can, which is also unobstructed.
